OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript:
{ "JobSectionDetails": { "SelectOption": "Create from scratch", "ShowSearchTemplate": false, "SearchTemplate-Block": null, "Formula1Content": null, "SectionName1": "Job Overview", "Type2": "Overview", "SelectStatus1": "InDraft", "Language1": "English", "SectionStartDate1": "2024-04-01", "SectionEndDate1": "2024-05-30", "SectionDescription1": "Job Overview Description", "Formula1": "
  • India - Remote
  • Full time
  • Customer Success Manager
", "Formula2": "
  • India - Remote
  • Full time
  • Customer Success Manager
", "PopulateContent": "New section" }, "JobDetailsSection2": { "SelectOption1": "Use Fields from an Existing Section", "ShowSearchTemplate1": true, "SearchTemplateSection2-Block": { "SearchTemplateSection2": "Summary", "Section2Content": "

Summary Content section

", "Section2EndDate": "2024-04-03", "Section2Id": "18CSB00000000zK2AQ", "Section2Type": "Job Summary", "Section2Name": "Summary", "Section2Status": "InDraft", "Section2Language": "English", "Section2Description": "Contrary to popular belief, Lorem Ipsum is not simply random text. It has roots in a piece of classical Latin literature from 45 BC, making it over 2000 years old." }, "FormulaSection2": "

Summary Content section

", "Section2Nam": null, "Select1": null, "SelectStatus2": null, "LanguageSection2": null, "SectionStartDate2": null, "SectionEndDate2": null, "SectionDescription2": null, "Formula3": "

We're looking for exceptional candidates to join the Customer Success Team as a Principal Customer Success Manager and work with our most complex high value customer engagements.

", "Formula4": "

We're looking for exceptional candidates to join the Customer Success Team as a Principal Customer Success Manager and work with our most complex high value customer engagements.

", "SectionPopulateContent": "New section" }, "JobDetailsSection3": { "SelectOption3": "Use Fields from an Existing Section", "ShowSearchTemplate3": true, "SearchTemplateSection3-Block": { "SearchTemplateSection3": "Responsibilities", "Section3Content": "

Responsibilities section

", "Section3EndDate": "2024-04-25", "Section3StartDate": "2024-04-03", "Section3Id": "18CSB00000000zL2AQ", "Section3Type": "Duties", "Section3Status": "InDraft", "Section3Name": "Responsibilities", "Section3Language": "English", "Section3Description": "Contrary to popular belief, Lorem Ipsum is not simply random text. It has roots in a piece of classical Latin literature from 45 BC, making it over 2000 years old." }, "ContentforExistingContent": "

Responsibilities section

", "SectionName3": null, "SelectType3": null, "SelectStatus3": null, "SelectLanguage3": null, "SelectStartDate3": null, "SelectEndDate3": null, "SectionDescription3": null, "Formula5": "

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop a deep understanding of assigned customers business and industry to ensure maximum impact of Salesforce products
  • Manage accountability of Salesforce with our customers
  • Provide digital strategy thought leadership, leveraging Salesforce s multi-cloud platform
  • Scope, plan and lead the delivery of engagements that enable the desired customer business outcomes.
", "Formula6": "

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop a deep understanding of assigned customers business and industry to ensure maximum impact of Salesforce products
  • Manage accountability of Salesforce with our customers
  • Provide digital strategy thought leadership, leveraging Salesforce s multi-cloud platform
  • Scope, plan and lead the delivery of engagements that enable the desired customer business outcomes.
", "PopulateContent3": "New section" }, "JobPostingDetails": { "RecruitmentRequisition": "Salesforce Hiring", "JobPostingName": "Customer Success Manager - India", "JobCandidateSourceKey": "Salesforce Sales Cloud", "JobPostingType": "External", "PostingStatus": "InDraft", "JobPostingDescription": "Manager Hiring", "JobStartDate": "2024-05-01", "JobPostingEndDate": "2024-05-31" }, "ContextId": "18ASB000000004r2AA", "omniscriptId": "0jNSB0000003qLR2AY", "language": "English", "type": "Recruitment", "runMode": "preview", "sId": "0jNSB0000003qLR2AY", "theme": "lightning", "subType": "JobPosting", "timeStamp": "2024-04-24T03:53:08.682Z", "userProfile": "System Administrator", "userTimeZoneName": "America/Los_Angeles", "userTimeZone": "-420", "userCurrencyCode": "USD", "userName": "recruitmentsdb27@pss.com", "userId": "005SB0000069JJJYA2", "omniProcessId": "0jNSB0000003qLR2AY", "localTimeZoneName": "Asia/Calcutta", "Id": "18ASB000000004r2AA", "VacancyTitle": "Salesforce Hiring", "MeetingNotes": "

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop a deep understanding of assigned customers business and industry to ensure maximum impact of Salesforce products
  • Manage accountability of Salesforce with our customers
  • Provide digital strategy thought leadership, leveraging Salesforce s multi-cloud platform
  • Scope, plan and lead the delivery of engagements that enable the desired customer business outcomes.
", "omniScriptId": "0jNSB0000003qLR2AY", "elementName": "IntegrationProcedureAction1" }
OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Creates a recruitment posting record and the recruitment content section records. Then, creates recruitment posting content section records that relate recruitment content section records with the recruitment posting record.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreateRecruitmentPostingandRelatedRecords

omniProcessElements.name: DeleteAction1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "allOrNone" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "deleteSObject" : [ { "AllOrNone" : false, "Id" : "", "Type" : "RecruitmentPostingCntntSect" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DeleteAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: DMSaveRecruitmentSection1Existing
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "RecruitmentContentSectionId" : "=%PostingDetailsSection1:SearchTemplate-Block:Section1Id%", "RecruitmentPostingId" : "=%RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentPosting:JobPostingId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentPostingContentSection", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "%PostingDetailsSection1:PopulateContent%==\"Existing section\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataRaptorPostAction7", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: DMSaveRecruitmentSection2Existing
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "RecruitmentContentSectionId" : "=%PostingDetailsSection2:SearchTemplateSection2-Block:Section2Id%", "RecruitmentPostingId" : "=%RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentPosting:JobPostingId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentPostingContentSection", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "%PostingDetailsSection2:SectionPopulateContent%==\"Existing section\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataRaptorPostAction7", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: DMSaveRecruitmentSection3Existing
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "RecruitmentContentSectionId" : "=%PostingDetailsSection3:SearchTemplateSection3-Block:Section3Id%", "RecruitmentPostingId" : "=%RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentPosting:JobPostingId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentPostingContentSection", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "%PostingDetailsSection3:PopulateContent3%==\"Existing section\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataRaptorPostAction7", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: ListOfContentSection
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "filterListFormula" : "", "hasPrimary" : false, "label" : "ListAction1", "mergeFields" : [ ], "mergeListsOrder" : [ "RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentContentSection1:RecruitmentContentSection_1", "RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentContentSection2:RecruitmentContentSection_1", "RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentContentSection3:RecruitmentContentSection_1" ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "updateFieldValue" : { "" : "" }, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentPostingContentSection
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "RecruitmentContentSectionId" : "=%ListOfContentSection:Id%", "RecruitmentPostingId" : "=%RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentPosting:JobPostingId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentPostingContentSection", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "ListOfContentSection!=NULL", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataRaptorPostAction5", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentContentSection1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContentLanguage" : "=%RecruitmentTransformContentSectionInput:Section1ContentLanguage%", "ContentName" : "=%RecruitmentTransformContentSectionInput:Section1ContentName%", "ContentType" : "=%RecruitmentTransformContentSectionInput:Section1ContentType%", "SectionContent" : "=%RecruitmentTransformContentSectionInput:Section1Content%", "SectionDescription" : "=%RecruitmentTransformContentSectionInput:Section1Description%", "SectionEndDate" : "=%RecruitmentTransformContentSectionInput:Section1EndDate%", "SectionStartDate" : "=%RecruitmentTransformContentSectionInput:Section1StartDate%", "SectionStatus" : "=%RecruitmentTransformContentSectionInput:Section1Status%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "JobContentID" : "=%RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentContentSection1:RecruitmentContentSection_1:Id%" }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentCreateRecruitmentContentSection", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "%PostingDetailsSection1:PopulateContent%!=\"Existing section\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataRaptorPostAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
